provenance.snippet:
PCR: PCR 2019:14 Construction Products, Version 2.0.1, 2025-06-05
c-PCR: c-PCR-003 (to 2019:14) Concrete and concrete elements, version 2025-04-08
1 cubic metre (m3) of Premixed concrete with a 25MPa strength grade and identifying characteristics
Product code AR2520 | Strength grade 25MPa | Density 2 270 kg/m3 | Applications General use concrete
The processes in modules A1-A3 have been modelled to represent concrete production in Rockbank, near Melbourne, Australia.
GWP-total kg CO2-eq. 1.40E+02 | GWP-fossil 1.40E+02 | GWP-biogenic -2.40E-01 | GWP-luluc 1.19E-02

A4.reason: ND = module is not declared. When a module is not accounted for, the stage is marked with 'ND' (Not Declared).

A5.reason: ND = module is not declared. When a module is not accounted for, the stage is marked with 'ND' (Not Declared).

provenance.snippet: GWP-total kg CO2-eq. 1.20E+01 | GWP-fossil 1.20E+01 | GWP-biogenic 7.97E-04 | GWP-luluc 5.76E-06 [Module C1]
GWP-total kg CO2-eq. 1.45E+01 | GWP-fossil 1.45E+01 | GWP-biogenic 8.98E-04 | GWP-luluc 6.86E-06 [Module C2]
GWP-total kg CO2-eq. 8.03E+00 | GWP-fossil 7.82E+00 | GWP-biogenic 2.09E-01 | GWP-luluc 3.63E-06 [Module C3]
GWP-total kg CO2-eq. 8.61E-01 | GWP-fossil 8.61E-01 | GWP-biogenic 6.95E-05 | GWP-luluc 4.18E-07 [Module C4]
GWP-total kg CO2-eq. -9.79E+00 | GWP-fossil -9.77E+00 | GWP-biogenic -1.92E-02 | GWP-luluc -1.51E-06 [Module D]

notes: GWP-total for A1-A3 is 1.40E+02 = 140 kg CO2-eq. The GWP-fossil is also 1.40E+02; these are effectively equal due to rounding in the table.
Modules A4, A5, B1-B7 are marked ND (Not Declared) as construction and use stage scenarios cannot be defined for the range of premixed concrete applications.
The EPD covers a single product mix (AR2520, 25MPa) manufactured at Rockbank. No other mixes are declared in this document.

End-of-life default scenario assumes 84% recycling and 16% landfill based on National Waste Report 2022 (Victorian building & demolition materials). Additional 100% recycling and 100% landfill scenarios are provided in Table 13/14.
CO2-uptake (carbonation) has not been included at end-of-life due to high uncertainty.
GWP-biogenic in A1-A3 is negative (-2.40E-01 kg CO2-eq.) due to proxy admixture data showing negative GWP-biogenic values.
Strength class reported as '25MPa' (verbatim from product table); no standard compressive strength class notation (e.g. C25/30) is used in this EPD.
